title: WhyJan's Better Foliage
description: This texture pack improves the foliage of your game.
body:
Hello!

This pack aims to add a subtle change to Minecraft's foliage. Current features are:
- Bushy leaves
- Foliage overlays
- Variated plants
- Bushy leaves support for Wilder Wilds Mod
- and much more!

Some features will require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).

_Please note, you are NOT allowed to redistribute this pack without my explicit permission. You are NOT allowed to take any of these textures out of my pack and claim them as your own. If you are created a texture pack solely for yourself and are not sharing it with anyone, you may use these textures as well but please do not redistribute this pack or steal any of my work. Thanks!_
